category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an Android/Desktop remake of Civ V; official GitHub README describes it as a moddability-focused Android and Desktop remake of Civ V.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Unciv; source_facts.name is unciv.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation is generated from the repository docs and covers Unciv modding; GitHub README is the official project overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/yairm210/Unciv, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify Unciv as an Android/Desktop Civ V-style 4X strategy game with modding focus.
